agentSummary.yesterday: Yesterday, {meetingCount} {meetingCount, plural, one {meeting was} other {meetings were}} processed and {actionCount} {actionCount, plural, one {action item was} other {action items were}} identified.
agentSummary.today: Today, you have {upcomingCount} {upcomingCount, plural, one {upcoming meeting} other {upcoming meetings}}.

summarySection.title: Summary Section
summarySection.description: In the last {windowDays} days, {meetingCount} {meetingCount, plural, one {meeting was conducted} other {meetings were conducted}}. You were assigned {assignedTaskCount} {assignedTaskCount, plural, one {task} other {tasks}}.
summarySection.briefingMeetingsLine: {topics}{remaining, plural, =0 {} one { and # more meeting} other { and # more meetings}} were processed.
summarySection.briefingTasksLine: You have {assignedTaskCount} {assignedTaskCount, plural, one {task} other {tasks}} assigned.
summarySection.briefingHint: Tip: this page helps people quickly get context again after vacation or on the next day.
summarySection.empty: No processed meetings were found for the selected time window.
summarySection.noMeetingSummary: No short summary is available for this meeting yet.
summarySection.assignedTasks: Assigned to you: {count} {count, plural, one {task} other {tasks}}

hero.subtitle: Your AI-powered workplace agent that transforms meetings into actionable outcomes
hero.description: Automatically process Microsoft Teams meetings, extract decisions and TODOs, and sync them to Jira—all while you focus on what matters.

autonomous.title: Autonomous Agent
autonomous.description: Works in the background, no manual intervention needed

extraction.title: Smart Extraction
extraction.description: Identifies decisions and actionable tasks from conversations

sync.title: Auto-Sync
sync.description: Pushes TODOs directly to Jira with proper assignees

alerts.configRequired: Agent configuration required. See README.md for setup instructions.
